properties.name: Pomeroy Forest
properties.description: A beautiful forest walk with a hidden fairy trail and a great wooden play area for the kids.

properties.name: Grange Park (Playground and Outdoor Gym)
properties.description: Located in Omagh, this park features a large modern playground and equipment for adults too.

properties.name: Gortin Glen Forest Park
properties.description: Massive destination park with a huge new playground, mountain bike trails, and deer sightings.

properties.name: An Creagán
properties.description: A unique bogland experience with a forest play area and lovely walk-ways.

properties.name: Round Lake
properties.description: A peaceful lakeside spot in Fivemiletown with a playpark and caravan site.

properties.name: Davagh Road
properties.description: Home to the Dark Sky observatory and some great forest trails.

properties.name: Dungannon Park
properties.description: 70-acre setting with a large lake, playpark, and plenty of space for a picnic.

properties.name: Drum Manor Forest Park
properties.description: Famous for its colourful gardens and large playground near the old manor ruins.
